errorState.needHelpDesc: Check the documentation or reach out if the issue persists.

repoNotFound.title: Repository Not Found
repoNotFound.subtitle: We couldn't find the repository you're looking for.
hints: Repository is private and you haven't granted access
Repository name or owner is misspelled
Repository has been deleted or moved

projectNotFound.title: Project Not Found
projectNotFound.subtitle: The project you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
hints: You don't have access to this project

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.subtitle: You don't have permission to access this resource.
hints: You are not the project owner
Your account doesn't have the required permissions

serverSelector.connectServerFirst: Connect a server first, then come back to continue setup.

policyEditor.rotateConfirm: Rotate webhook token? The current URL will stop working.
policyEditor.cronPlaceholder: Custom cron (5 fields), or leave blank for manual-only
policyEditor.retainCountHint: Keep N most recent succeeded runs
policyEditor.retainDaysHint: Drop runs older than N days
policyEditor.preDeployLabel: Automatically back up before each new deployment lands
policyEditor.preDeployHint: Fires on every successful build, just before the new code goes live.
policyEditor.webhookHint: Generates a per-policy token. POST to the URL from any external trigger (GitHub Actions, monitoring, your own scheduler).
policyEditor.preHookHint: Common for DBs: pg_dump > /tmp/dump.sql. Failure aborts the run.
policyEditor.postHookHint: Cleanup; failures logged but don't fail the run.
policyEditor.detected: Detected {label} — Auto backs it up with {method}.
policyEditor.autoNoDb: No database detected — Auto will snapshot this service's volumes.
policyEditor.volumeHint: Tars every volume for this service. Runs live, crash-consistent.
policyEditor.customCommandHint: Runs inside the container; its stdout becomes the artifact.
policyEditor.customCommandRequired: Enter a dump command for the custom method.

connectionGate.deployedOn: This project is deployed on Openship Cloud
connectionGate.sessionMissing: Your Openship Cloud session is missing. Connect to manage deployments, view logs, and access runtime controls for {name}.
connectionGate.readOnlyNote: You can still browse this page in read-only mode while disconnected.

githubPermission.title: Connect to GitHub
githubPermission.subtitle: Choose repository access level
githubPermission.intro: Select which repositories Openship can access. You can change this later in your GitHub settings.
githubPermission.publicDesc: Access to your public repositories. Perfect for open source projects.
githubPermission.allDesc: Full access to all your repositories. Required for private projects.
githubPermission.allItem1: Read public and private repository data
githubPermission.noteText: You can revoke access at any time from your GitHub settings under Applications → Authorized OAuth Apps.

resourcePicker.coveredByOrg: Covered by the org-wide grant above.

publicEndpoints.accessibleWhere: Where your site will be accessible

configEditor.rewritesHint: Serve another path/backend without changing the URL (e.g. /api/(.*) → backend).
configEditor.headersHint: Response headers added for matching paths.

recordLabels.CNAME: Routes traffic through the edge network

settingsCard.staticPathHint: Serve files from this subdirectory inside the build output. Use {path} for the root output.
settingsCard.dnsHintSelfhosted: Add the A record pointing to your server IP, then the TXT record for verification.
settingsCard.dnsHintCloud: Add the CNAME record for routing, then the TXT record for verification.
settingsCard.dnsPropagation: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours.

updates.rerunInstall: Re-run your install to update your self-hosted server.
updates.seeChanges: See what changed in this release.
updates.noNotes: No release notes for this version.
